is_consistent.description: Whether the CER intended purpose is consistent with the IFU and MDCG 2020-6 requirements.

findings.description: List of detected mismatches or gaps between CER, IFU, and regulatory expectations.

item.description: The specific intended-purpose element being checked (e.g., User, Effect, Indications).

mismatch_description.description: Detailed description of the discrepancy or gap found.

source_ref.description: Reference to the source document and section where the issue was found (e.g., 'CER.txt Section 1' or 'IFU.txt Intended Use').

mdr_compliance_status.description: Overall MDR / MDCG 2020-6 compliance status of the intended purpose statement.
